title: Replace location dropdown with embedded map showing exact Indore address

requirements.text: Remove the north/south location filter dropdown from the Contact page and replace it with a single embedded interactive map component that displays the exact location: 622, Ushanagar, Narendra Tiwari Marg, Annapurna Road, Indore

quotes: in the location first it shoult be a single option of location not north or south but it is a option of location which have the real map
the exact location of the rasoi is 622, Ushanagar, Narendra Tiwari Marg, Annapurna Road, Indore
i want that in the map show this location

acceptanceCriteria: Location dropdown selector is removed from the Contact page
A single embedded map is displayed showing the location at 622, Ushanagar, Narendra Tiwari Marg, Annapurna Road, Indore
The map is interactive and shows a marker at the exact address
Map is properly responsive and integrates with the existing Bootstrap layout

requirements.text: Update the backend ContactData type and getContactData method to return a single location object with the address '622, Ushanagar, Narendra Tiwari Marg, Annapurna Road, Indore' instead of multiple location options

quotes: in the location first it shoult be a single option of location not north or south

acceptanceCriteria: ContactData type is updated to have a single location field instead of an array
getContactData method returns the exact address: 622, Ushanagar, Narendra Tiwari Marg, Annapurna Road, Indore
Existing contact data structure maintains phone, email, and hours fields

constraints: Use Bootstrap grid system for map layout integration
Do not modify Internet Identity hooks or useActor.ts
nonGoals: Creating location management or CRUD operations
Adding geolocation or user location detection features
